name: Mancos Valley Farmers Market

Products.value: High-quality products from local Mancos Valley producers of all kinds

notes: On-file website https://mancosvalleyresources.com is the homepage of Mancos Valley Resources (MVR), the market's fiscal sponsor/parent org; the homepage itself has no market info, but MVR hosts a dedicated, actively-maintained market page (recent-posts widget shows 2026 newsletters, confirming the site is current) at the URL used above -- treated as the official source. Market takes place at Boyle Park in downtown Mancos; the on-file street address (150 Grand Ave) was not confirmed or contradicted by this source, so it was left unchanged. On-file Facebook URL was confirmed correct. SNAP/EBT acceptance, phone number, ADA accessibility, and certified-organic status were not stated on this official page and were omitted (third-party sites like Colorado.com/AARP mention SNAP but were not used as they are not official sources).
